scripts.dev: npm run dev:stop && npm run dev:run
scripts.dev:run: concurrently -k -n BACKEND,STORE,ADMIN -c cyan,white,gray "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix storyuser run dev" "npm --prefix story-luxury-admin run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix storyuser && npm install --prefix story-luxury-admin && npm install
scripts.build: npm --prefix storyuser run build && npm --prefix story-luxury-admin run build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix storyuser run lint && npm --prefix story-luxury-admin run lint
